diagnoses.name: Atherosclerotic heart disease of native coronary artery with unstable angina pectoris
diagnoses.evidence_span: presented with chest discomfort concerning for unstable angina pectoris. He reports a several-day history of exertional chest pressure radiating to the left arm, associated with mild dyspnea. Given his extensive past medical history of atherosclerotic heart disease of native coronary arteries

diagnoses.name: Atherosclerotic heart disease of native coronary artery with prior revascularization
diagnoses.evidence_span: extensive past medical history of atherosclerotic heart disease of native coronary arteries with prior revascularization, including placement of an aortocoronary bypass graft and coronary angioplasty with stent implant

diagnoses.name: Hypertensive heart disease with heart failure
diagnoses.evidence_span: His hypertensive heart disease with heart failure and chronic systolic congestive heart failure were optimized

diagnoses.name: Chronic systolic (congestive) heart failure
diagnoses.evidence_span: chronic systolic congestive heart failure were optimized with careful monitoring of fluid status and vital signs

diagnoses.name: Paroxysmal atrial flutter
diagnoses.evidence_span: His atrial flutter remained paroxysmal without hemodynamic compromise; rate control was maintained with his current diltiazem regimen

diagnoses.name: Hyperlipidemia
diagnoses.evidence_span: His hyperlipidemia was addressed with continuation of his statin and niacin therapy

diagnoses.name: Asthma
diagnoses.evidence_span: His unspecified asthma remained stable and well-controlled on current medications without exacerbation during admission

diagnoses.name: Transient ischemic attack (TIA)
diagnoses.evidence_span: prior transient ischemic attack and cerebral infarction, which fortunately resolved without residual neurologic deficits

diagnoses.name: Cerebral infarction without residual deficits
diagnoses.evidence_span: prior transient ischemic attack and cerebral infarction, which fortunately resolved without residual neurologic deficits

diagnoses.name: Carotid artery occlusion and stenosis, left, hemodynamically significant
diagnoses.evidence_span: hemodynamically significant occlusion and stenosis of his left carotid artery, which has been managed medically

diagnoses.name: Prosthetic heart valve
diagnoses.evidence_span: His prosthetic heart valve continues to function appropriately without evidence of dysfunction or infection

diagnoses.name: Hodgkin lymphoma
diagnoses.evidence_span: patient has a past medical history of Hodgkin lymphoma treated with chemotherapy and radiation, as well as prior malignant neoplasm of the prostate treated with surgery, both of which remain in remission

diagnoses.name: Malignant neoplasm of the prostate
diagnoses.evidence_span: prior malignant neoplasm of the prostate treated with surgery, both of which remain in remission

diagnoses.name: Family history of ischemic heart disease and other diseases of the circulatory system
diagnoses.evidence_span: Strong family history of ischemic heart disease and other circulatory diseases underscores the importance of aggressive preventive management

diagnoses.name: Mottled rash of unclear etiology
diagnoses.evidence_span: A mottled rash of unclear etiology appeared on the patient's trunk on hospital day 2, which remained nonpruritic and stable throughout his stay

procedures.name: Telemetry monitoring
procedures.evidence_span: admitted for telemetry monitoring and further cardiac assessment

procedures.name: Cardiac enzyme testing
procedures.evidence_span: Cardiac enzymes were obtained and were negative for acute myocardial infarction

procedures.name: EKG
procedures.evidence_span: EKG showed no acute ST changes

procedures.name: Aortocoronary bypass graft placement
procedures.evidence_span: including placement of an aortocoronary bypass graft and coronary angioplasty with stent implant

medications.name: Aspirin
medications.evidence_span: Aspirin 81 mg once daily by mouth

medications.name: Clopidogrel
medications.evidence_span: Clopidogrel 75 mg once daily by mouth

medications.name: Diltiazem extended-release
medications.evidence_span: Diltiazem extended-release 120 mg once daily by mouth

medications.name: Isosorbide mononitrate extended-release
medications.evidence_span: Isosorbide mononitrate extended-release 30 mg once daily by mouth

medications.name: Niacin
medications.evidence_span: Niacin 1000 mg once daily by mouth

medications.name: Fish oil (omega-3)
medications.evidence_span: Fish oil (omega-3) 1000 mg once daily by mouth

medications.name: Ramelteon
medications.frequency: at bedtime as needed for sleep
medications.evidence_span: Ramelteon 8 mg at bedtime by mouth as needed for sleep

medications.name: Acetaminophen
medications.evidence_span: Acetaminophen 500-1000 mg every 6 hours as needed for pain by mouth

chief_complaint: Chest discomfort concerning for unstable angina pectoris
